event_comments:
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
msp: missing punch; dnf: did not finish; nc: not competing; ovt: overtime; dns: did not start; dq: disqualified.
<time>* means the course completion status was not reported and may be valid, msp, or dnf.
